idea-plugin.name: Simple Rainbow Delimiters
idea-plugin.description:
Simplest delimiter coloring free!

Rainbow coloring for (), [], {} based on nesting level.
Works in multiple IDEs (RustRover, Rider, IntelliJ-based).

Features
  • Rainbow coloring for ()[]{} by nesting level
  • Works in Rust, C#, Java, Kotlin, C/C++, JS/TS and more
  • Skips strings and comments when possible (lexer-based)
  • Lightweight: highlights only visible area
Open Source https://github.com/YagirProtect/JetBrains-Plugin-Rainbow-Delimiters-Free
